serviceNotes.engine oil: Updated to 10,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (Tier 2 Mercedes E-Class four-cylinder diesel table; OM654 W213 family). Rec 8,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz W213 maintenance plan.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (was 60,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each workshop visit; ~30,000 km planning reminder.
serviceNotes.coolant: Updated to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (90,000 km or 5 years).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 9G-TRONIC preventive fluid ~60,000 km despite lifetime classification.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary exchange ~120,000 km between OEM coolant renewals.

serviceSources.engine oil: Changed from 25,000 km / 12 months to 10,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (Mercedes E 250 2013 CDI Automatic; Tier 2 proxy for OM654 four-cylinder diesel W213)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W213 scheduled maintenance; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W213
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W213 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 150,000 km to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (90,000 km or 5 years, whichever first)
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Changed REC from 100,000 km to 90,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7583-2013/service (serpentine / drive belt)
